states.name: Eves
states.title: Elf Seaspire
states.description: Eves is a Seaspire. Seaspires are an elite elf anti-terrorist order which operates freelance for the various empires. They exist to stop pirates and seamonsters.

states.name: Eves
states.title: Elf Seaspire
states.description: Eves developed a mysterious form of armor which operates perfectly underwater. He equipped the entire order in his invention. Now, one Seaspire can sink a pirate cruiser if undetected.
